name: caldav-calendar
tagline: ClawHub (244★): Sync and query CalDAV calendars (iCloud, Google, Fastmail, Nextcloud, etc.) using vdirsyncer + khal. Works on Linux.
verdict: Covers sync, view, search, create, edit, and delete on calendars but never says what it's NOT for, so it can misfire against other calendar tools. No version or changelog either, so you can't tell what changed between updates. Security is solid; it just lacks scoping and traceability.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere in description or body; skill covers multiple broad actions (sync/view/search/create/edit/delete) so misfire against other calendar tools is
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
States what the skill does and lists providers, but never phrases a 'use when' trigger cue for a dispatching agent.
